div.span:
Step 2 — Weighted Sum
─────────────────────────────────
Composite_Score =
0.25 × Return_Score
+ 0.20 × Vol_Score
+ 0.25 × Sharpe_Score
+ 0.15 × Drawdown_Score
+ 0.15 × Momentum_Score
─────────────────────────────────
norm(x) = (x − min) / (max − min)
if range = 0 → score = 0.5

svg.text: Composite Scoring — Normalise then Weighted Sum
